title: Gema Waktu di Sudut Lift
theme: Bagaimana teknologi secara halus mengubah persepsi kita tentang waktu dan ingatan, memaksa kita menerima momen-momen yang berlalu.

cover.prompt: An interior view of a modern lift, looking towards the closed metallic doors. The polished surfaces reflect a soft, diffused overhead illumination. There's a subtle, almost imperceptible visual hesitation in the doors' natural rhythm, giving the space a feeling of quiet density, as if imbued with a gentle, unseen weight. Minimalist composition, with a shallow depth of field, focusing on this quiet stillness and the almost-there moment of closure.
cover.style: Cinematic photography, shallow depth of field, warm color grading

meta.plan_summary: Elara, a young professional, experiences strange micro-glitches and temporal distortions in her apartment lift, leading her to question her sanity and the accuracy of her memories. During one significant event, she sees vivid fragments of her past memories appearing on the lift walls. She ultimately doesn't find a solution but comes to a quiet, melancholic acceptance of these 'echoes of time,' realizing they teach her about the fragility of memory and the beauty of fleeting moments.
